rulebooks.section_content:
GRI 305: Emissions

시드: 섹션 1(주제별 관리), 공개 305-1~305-7. 주의: GRI305-1-1·GRI305-1-2는 공개 305-1의 절 2.1·2.2 트리이며 공개 305-2 루트(GRI305-2)와 혼동 금지.

required_actions.description: 시드 범위 내 GRI 305 요구사항을 충족해야 함

rulebooks.section_content:
Section 1: Management disclosures for the topic (emissions)

The reporting organization shall report how it manages emissions using GRI 3 Disclosure 3-3, and when reporting GHG emissions targets shall explain use of offsets including type, amount, and criteria or scheme.

required_actions.description: 배출 관리를 GRI 3 공개 3-3 틀로 보고해야 함
GHG 목표 보고 시 상쇄 사용 여부 및 유형·양·제도/기준을 설명해야 함

rulebooks.section_content:
Clause 1.1

The reporting organization shall report how it manages emissions using Disclosure 3-3 in GRI 3: Material Topics 2021. This supplements (does not replace) Disclosure 3-3.

required_actions.description: GRI 3 공개 3-3에 따라 배출 관리를 보고해야 함

verification_checks.description: GRI3-3-3 요지(주제별 관리)와 정합되는 배출 관리 서술이 있는지 확인

cross_references: GRI 3: Material Topics 2021, Disclosure 3-3 (gri_3 시드: GRI3-3-3)

rulebooks.section_content:
Clause 1.2

When reporting on GHG emissions targets, the reporting organization shall explain whether it used offsets to achieve the targets, including the type, amount, and criteria or scheme the offsets are part of.

required_actions.description: 목표 보고 시 상쇄 사용 여부와 유형·양·기준/제도를 설명해야 함(단일 요구 문항)

verification_checks.description: 상쇄 미사용/사용 및 사용 시 세부(유형·양·제도)가 모두 드러나는지 확인

rulebooks.mapping_notes: 원문에 로마숫자 하위 항목 없음 → 단일 DP.

rulebooks.section_content: The reporting organization can also describe the application of emission-related regulations and policies at national, regional, or industry level and provide examples.

verification_checks.description: 선택 보고 시 규제·정책의 적용 범위와 예시가 구체적인지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: The reporting organization can disclose emission treatment costs (e.g., filters, treatment agents) and costs of purchasing and using emission allowances.

verification_checks.description: 선택 보고 시 비용 범주와 산정·인식 경계가 명확한지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: Section 2: Topic-related disclosures — 305-1 through 305-7 in seed.

Disclosure 305-1: Direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions

REQUIREMENTS (a–g)
As stated in the standard for items a through g.

COMPILATION REQUIREMENTS 2.1 (shall)
Mapped to dp_ids GRI305-1-1, GRI305-1-1-1, GRI305-1-1-2.

RECOMMENDATIONS 2.2 (should)
Mapped to dp_ids GRI305-1-2 and descendants through GRI305-1-2-5-4.

Note: GRI305-1-1 and GRI305-1-2 trees map the standard’s compilation clause numbers under Disclosure 305-1; they do not denote Disclosure 305-2.

required_actions.description: 305-1-a~g 및 정보 수집 2.1(GRI305-1-1 트리)을 충족해야 함; 권고 2.2는 GRI305-1-2 트리

verification_checks.description: 필수 항목 a~g와 GRI305-1-1·GRI305-1-1-1·GRI305-1-1-2가 모두 다뤄졌는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 305-1-a: Report total gross direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent.

required_actions.description: gross Scope 1 총배출을 t CO2e로 보고

rulebooks.section_content: 305-1-b: Report gases included in the calculation (CO2, CH4, N2O, HFCs, PFCs, SF6, NF3, or all).
305-1-c: Report biogenic CO2 emissions in metric tons of CO2 equivalent, separately from gross Scope 1 as per compilation requirements.

verification_checks.description: 생물성 CO2가 gross Scope 1과 구분되어 제시되었는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 305-1-d: Report base year for the calculation, if applicable, including i. rationale, ii. emissions in the base year, iii. context for recalculation triggers.

required_actions.description: 해당 시 기준년도 및 i~iii 하위 항목을 보고

verification_checks.description: 적용 시 d-i~d-iii가 모두 충족되었는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 305-1-d-i: Rationale for choosing the base year.
305-1-d-iii: Context for any significant changes in emissions that triggered recalculation of base year emissions.

required_actions.description: 재산정을 유발한 중대 변화의 맥락 설명

rulebooks.section_content: 305-1-e: Source of emission factors and GWP rates used, or reference to the GWP source.
305-1-f: Consolidation approach for emissions — equity share, financial control, or operational control.

required_actions.description: 연결 방식을 세 가지 중 하나로 명시

rulebooks.section_content: 305-1-g: Standards, methodologies, assumptions, and/or calculation tools used.
Compilation requirements 2.1 for Disclosure 305-1 (shall). When compiling 305-1 information, the reporting organization shall comply with 2.1.1 and 2.1.2.
rulebooks.mapping_notes: dp_id GRI305-1-1은 공개 305-2가 아니라 공개 305-1의 절 2.1 그룹.

rulebooks.section_content: 2.1.1 Exclude any GHG trades from the calculation of gross direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions.

required_actions.description: 온실가스 거래를 gross Scope 1 산정에서 제외

verification_checks.description: 상쇄·거래가 총량 산정에 섞이지 않았는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 2.1.2 Report biogenic CO2 from combustion or biodegradation of biomass separately from gross Scope 1; exclude other biogenic GHGs and biogenic CO2 from other lifecycle stages as specified.

required_actions.description: 생물성 CO₂ 별도 보고 및 기타 생물성 배출 제외 규칙 적용

verification_checks.description: 생물성 CO₂ 분리 및 제외 규칙이 305-1-c·총량과 정합한지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: Recommendations 2.2 when compiling Disclosure 305-1 (should). Includes 2.2.1 through 2.2.5 and breakdown dimensions 2.2.5.1–2.2.5.4.

required_actions.description: 권고 2.2 하위 항목을 가능한 범위에서 준수

verification_checks.description: 권고 트리(GRI305-1-2-*)가 보고 맥락에서 검토되었는지 확인

rulebooks.mapping_notes: dp_id GRI305-1-2는 공개 305-2가 아니라 공개 305-1의 절 2.2 그룹.

rulebooks.section_content: 2.2.1 Apply emission factors and GWP rates consistently for the data disclosed.

verification_checks.description: 일관성 주장 시 기간·범위 내 동일 기준 적용 근거 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 2.2.2 Use GWP rates from IPCC assessment reports based on a 100-year timeframe.

verification_checks.description: GWP 출처 및 시간지평이 드러나는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 2.2.3 Select a consistent consolidation approach for Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions from GHG Protocol Corporate Standard methods.

verification_checks.description: Scope 2 공시가 있을 때 Scope 1과 연결 논리가 모순되지 않는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 2.2.4 Explain the chosen approach if different standards and methodologies are applied.

verification_checks.description: 혼용 시 투명한 근거가 있는지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: 2.2.5 Disaggregate Scope 1 emissions where it aids transparency or comparability over time.

verification_checks.description: 세분화 제공 시 하위 차원과 총량의 합산 정합성 확인
시설별 제시 시 경계 정의 명확

rulebooks.section_content: 2.2.5.3 By type of source (stationary combustion, process, fugitive).

verification_checks.description: 원 유형 정의가 Scope 1 지침과 모순되지 않는지 확인
활동 분류와 배출 배분이 총량과 정합한지 확인

rulebooks.section_content: Disclosure 305-2: Energy indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions — requirements a–g; compilation 2.3; recommendations 2.4.
Disclosure 305-3: Other indirect (Scope 3) GHG emissions — a–g; compilation 2.5; recommendations 2.6.

cross_references: GHG Protocol Corporate Value Chain (Scope 3) Standard

rulebooks.section_content: Disclosure 305-4: GHG emissions intensity — requirements a–d; compilation 2.7; recommendations 2.8.
Disclosure 305-5: Reduction of GHG emissions — a–e; compilation 2.9; recommendation 2.10.
Disclosure 305-6: Ozone-depleting substances — a–d; compilation 2.11; recommendations 2.12.
Production = produced − destroyed by approved tech − entirely used as feedstock.
Disclosure 305-7: NOx, SOx, and other significant air emissions — a (i–vii), b, c; compilation 2.13; recommendations 2.14.
